message:
fix(test-utils): reset() now clears errorMode to prevent test pollution

If a test enabled error mode and failed before calling disableErrorMode(),
subsequent tests would fail because beforeEach calls reset() but reset()
didn't clear errorMode.

Fixed by adding errorMode reset in reset() method. Added test to verify
this behavior.
